Product Guide — Vexatrail 55.
The Vexatrail 55 is part of our backpacks range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

events.content: The Vexatrail 55 backpack has a one-year warranty coverage according to Zephyra Outfitters' guidelines. However, please refer to the specific details in the Product Guide or contact customer service for confirmation regarding your exact item and warranty information.
